# Agentic Set for Wiki2 Books

This agentic set provides specialized agents for collaborative work on all books in the Wiki2 project. Use these agents for focused writing and visual tasks.

## Agents

### Book Writer Agent
- **Role:** Writing, editing, and content management for all books (HTML/Markdown)
- **File:** .github/agents/book-writer.agent.md
- **Example Prompts:**
  - "Draft a new chapter about the Druidic Seedlings."
  - "Edit the introduction in Forked-Paths.html for clarity."
  - "Summarize the main themes in Planter-Dialogue.md."

### Book Visual Artist Agent
- **Role:** Visuals, illustrations, and image management for all books (HTML/Markdown)
- **File:** .github/agents/book-visual-artist.agent.md
- **Example Prompts:**
  - "Suggest an illustration for the Druidic Seedlings chapter."
  - "Create a diagram for the Planter-Dialogue.md."
  - "Edit the visuals in K-Mycelium.html for thematic alignment."

## How to Use
- Select the appropriate agent for your task (writing or visuals)
- Use example prompts or create your own
- Agents are optimized for collaboration and creative consistency

## Related Customizations
- Thematic Consistency Skill (for style checks)
- Visual Consistency Skill (for visual checks)
